topicOverview: An in-depth deep dive into UI Fundamentals. Mastering this is critical for passing technical interviews for Mobile App Developer roles.
whyItMatters: UI Fundamentals is a core foundation of modern engineering. Interviewers use it as a proxy to test your deeper understanding of systems, performance, and best practices.
